channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Alphabet and Tesla test Wall Street's patience as AI spending overshadows growth
item.description: Shares of Alphabet and Tesla dipped after the companies reported massive spending increases in their quarterly earnings reports.

item.title: Oil prices climb after tanker struck off Saudi Arabia, Trump escalates Iran threats
item.description: Oil prices rose after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iranian infrastructure in response to any attacks on ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Hedge funds circle UK stocks as new PM Andy Burnham pledges 'new economic model'
item.description: Prime Minister Andy Burnham's overhaul of Britain's domestic policy could fuel a range of trading opportunities in U.K. stocks.

item.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
item.description: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.

item.title: Why we're sticking with Alphabet despite an imperfect quarter and more AI spending
item.description: The market isn't in a forgiving mood, but we're not in a hurry to leave this stock behind.

item.title: Silver and gold prices stage a cautious rebound — but analysts see slim hopes for a sustained rally
item.description: Precious metals have rallied in recent days, but analysts say prices could face a difficult path back to all-time highs achieved earlier this year.

item.title: Alphabet earnings takeaways: Q2 revenue beats, GOOGL stock sinks on 2026 capex hike
item.description: Google parent Alphabet reported second-quarter earnings after the bell on Wednesday.

item.title: Gen Z protests led by India’s 'Cockroach party' are testing Modi’s leadership
item.description: Student protests organized by a pseudo-political outfit, Cockroach Janta Party, are gaining momentum as they challenge the political establishment.

item.title: Biotech remains compelling even after major comeback. Here’s what investors say
item.description: The healthcare subsector has quietly become one of the most attractive opportunities this year.

item.title: Inside India newsletter: Skyroot rocket puts India alongside U.S., China in private orbital launch
item.description: Indian startup Skyroot joins Chinese and American private companies in the race to launch satellites in low orbit.

item.title: Analysis: Iran war energy shock hits the U.S. economy as gas and diesel prices climb
item.description: A new asymmetry in the market means fuel prices won't fall quickly even if the shooting in the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stops.

item.title: U.S. Secret Service official: 'Threat environment is the highest we've ever seen'
item.description: The Secret Service has seen a 40% increase this year in cases involving threats to protectees, including President Donald Trump.

item.title: U.S. signs nuclear power agreement with Saudi Arabia
item.description: The agreement will provide U.S. companies with access to Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy program, the Department of Energy said.

item.title: ‘Out-of-favor’ utilities could be the next beneficiaries of the AI trade – and they pay dividends, Wells Fargo says
item.description: A few overlooked names in the utilities sector could be poised for gains, the bank said.

item.title: Chip firm priced as China's most valuable company before its IPO brings scrutiny to crypto platform
item.description: The outsized premium was due in part to offshore investors who, locked out of the highly anticipated listings, turned to crypto for a parallel market.

item.title: Alphabet will post earnings after the bell. What the charts show ahead of the report
item.description: Frank Cappelleri of CappThesis breaks down the technicals in this megacap stock ahead of earnings.

item.title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
item.description: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

item.title: OpenAI cyber models broke out of training environment to hack Hugging Face
item.description: The incident is unique because it was "driven, end to end, by an autonomous AI agent system," according to Hugging Face.

item.title: Trump vows to bomb Iran's bridges, power plants if it shoots at ships in Hormuz Strait
item.description: He issued his threat after U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.

item.title: Southwest Airlines' third-quarter forecast falls short as fuel bill climbs
item.description: Southwest Airlines reported a more than 9% increase in second-quarter profit as higher fares are increasingly helping the airline cover its fuel tab.

item.title: J&J gets a big win on its new robotic surgical system — plus, a flood of earnings
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Chase Sapphire Preferred's 100K bonus is ending soon: 4 reasons to apply now
item.description: Chase Sapphire Preferred's 100K bonus is ending soon: Here's how the 100,000 points could be worth roughly $2,000 in travel.

item.title: Houthis deploy missiles and drones to attack ships in southern Red Sea, naval group says
item.description: Attacks on ships transiting the Bab el-Mandeb threaten to cut off millions of barrels per day of Saudi crude oil exports.

item.title: ServiceNow CEO defends the company's relevancy, touting a kill switch for rogue AI agents
item.description: ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott said the company is becoming increasingly important as businesses deploy more autonomous AI agents.

item.title: John Paulson says we are in the early stages of a long-term bull market for gold
item.description: He said demand for bullion continues to broaden, led by central banks that have been adding to their reserves alongside growing private-sector interest.

item.title: Senate crypto bill would ban federal officials — including presidents — from issuing digital assets
item.description: A new version of the Clarity Act would impose the first limits on federal officials sponsoring or issuing cryptocurrency.

item.title: EU antitrust regulators clear Paramount-WBD merger as it faces challenge by U.S. states
item.description: European regulators signed off on Paramount's proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery.

item.title: Senate panel advances China auto bill that could bar Mercedes-Benz from U.S.
item.description: Mercedes-Benz’s largest individual shareholder is Chinese state-owned BAIC. Cruz warned the bill could hurt Mercedes and accused GM of backing it.

item.title: Amazon cuts some jobs in its artificial general intelligence unit
item.description: Amazon's AGI unit has released a set of AI models, called Nova, and also includes groups working on silicon and quantum computing.

item.title: House advances bill barring sitting Congress members from buying stocks
item.description: The House on Wednesday advanced a bill that would bar members of Congress from purchasing additional stocks while in office.
